历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 16319 → 16211 → 20750 → 17854 → 19074, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023 (20750), rebounded to 17854 in 2024, and shifted backward again to 19074 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 1220 positions over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19074. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 81 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 85 in 2024, 94 in 2025, and planned 104 in 2026, an increase of 10 students (+10.6%) compared to 2025, with three consecutive years of expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 55th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 49–55 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of agricultural and forestry institutions. The 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving a library confession wall incident with limited impact. Douyin comprehensive heat ranking is 102, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure. No significant admission gaps recorded. Overall reputation is stable, without major negative public opinion. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics. Among the enrollment majors, Food Science and Engineering, Animal Medicine, Agronomy, Plant Protection, etc., directly correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and recruits across provinces. Its enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 0.07% (104 out of approximately 143,600), which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference impact. Its core majors (Agronomy, Plant Protection, Animal Medicine, Food Science, etc.) belong to the agricultural and forestry category, with overall social popularity being relatively cold. The broader fields of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials continue to be discouraged, but applied majors such as Animal Medicine and Food Science have stable employment. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Liaoning Province is approximately 143,600, basically unchanged from 2025. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been stable around 367 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the continued expansion of the 2026 plan by 10.6% (easing competition), the stable number of examinees, and the generally average popularity of agricultural and forestry majors, and taking into account the relatively large expansion but limited attention to agricultural and forestry universities in Liaoning, a minor correction predicts the minimum ranking to be approximately 20251, with a range of 19751–20751.
